naturalLanguageQuery: are there controls or faqs that mention compliance?
generatedSQL:
SELECT "category", "short", "long", "question", "answer" 
FROM "allTrustControls" 
WHERE "searchText" ILIKE '%compliance%' 
UNION 
SELECT "category", NULL, NULL, "question", "answer" 
FROM "allTrustFaqs" 
WHERE "searchText" ILIKE '%compliance%';
explanation: Query returned no results - not enough data to tell if correct or not
